languages.text: "Передай им другие координаты, и клянусь, об этом никто не узнает".
"Give them alternate coordinates, and I swear no one will find out about this."
languages.original_text: "Передай им другие координаты, и клянусь, об этом никто не узнает".

traits.locale_text: "Give them alternate coordinates, and I swear no one will find out about this."
"Give them alternate coordinates, and I swear no one will find out about this."
"Give them alternate coordinates, and I swear no one will find out about this."

languages.text: «Envíeles coordenadas alternativas y juro que nadie se enterará de esto».
languages.original_text: "Give them alternate coordinates, and I swear no one will find out about this."

traits.locale_text: «Envíeles coordenadas alternativas y juro que nadie se enterará de esto».

languages.text: “给他们另外的坐标，我保证没人会知道这件事。”
languages.original_text: "Give them alternate coordinates, and I swear no one will find out about this."

traits.locale_text: “给他们另外的坐标，我保证没人会知道这件事。”

languages.text: « Communiquez-leur d'autres coordonnées, et je vous jure que cette histoire restera entre nous. »
languages.original_text: "Give them alternate coordinates, and I swear no one will find out about this."

traits.locale_text: « Communiquez-leur d'autres coordonnées, et je vous jure que cette histoire restera entre nous. »

languages.text: "Onlara alternatif koordinatlar ver. Söz veriyorum, bundan kimsenin haberi olmayacak."
languages.original_text: "Give them alternate coordinates, and I swear no one will find out about this."

traits.locale_text: "Onlara alternatif koordinatlar ver. Söz veriyorum, bundan kimsenin haberi olmayacak."

languages.text: "Gebt ihnen andere Koordinaten, und ich schwöre, niemand wird hiervon erfahren."
languages.original_text: "Give them alternate coordinates, and I swear no one will find out about this."

traits.locale_text: "Gebt ihnen andere Koordinaten, und ich schwöre, niemand wird hiervon erfahren."

languages.text: 「別の座標を与えれば、誰もこのことを知ることなく済む。私はそう誓う。」
languages.original_text: "Give them alternate coordinates, and I swear no one will find out about this."

traits.locale_text: 「別の座標を与えれば、誰もこのことを知ることなく済む。私はそう誓う。」
